rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.17+commit.8df45f5f"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"author":"HopeLend, inspired by the OpenZeppelin Initializable contract","details":"WARNING: Unlike constructors, initializer functions must be manually invoked.
